title: MAJOR 2nd
synopsis: Shigeno Daigo is an elementary student whose father, Goro, is a professional baseball player. Inspired by his father, who was once a Major League player, Daigo started playing baseball with the Mifune Dolphins, a youth team. However, he was unable to live up to the expectations of being the son of a professional, and quit baseball after less than a year. Then, in the spring of his sixth-grade year, Daigo's school welcomes a transfer student, Sato Hikaru, whose father is Sato Toshiya, a former Major League player and Goro's close friend. The fate of these two young men begins to move forward! (Source: Crunchyroll)

title: Rozen Maiden: Ouvertüre
titleNative: ローゼンメイデン オーベルテューレ
synopsis: When Jun buys Shinku a brooch, she refuses to accept it at all costs. Souseiseki then confronts Jun with the reason for Shinku's behavior. The tragic story of Suigintou is told, with the revelation of why her hatred for Shinku could last throughout centuries. Note: This OVA has some spoilers of Rozen Maiden: Träumend, the second season of Rozen Maiden. These episodes fall chronologically between the 5th and 6th episodes of Rozen Maiden: Träumend, but might spoil later revelations.

titleNative: 君のいる町 黄昏交差点
synonyms: A Town Where You Live: Twilight Intersection
synopsis: Eba Yuzuki has mysteriously decided to go to high school in the countryside. But despite Kirishima Haruto's objections, she is living in his home. Now he has to put up with a freeloading city girl and even worse, make sure Kanzaki Nanami, the girl he likes, doesn't get the wrong idea!

title: Basilisk: The Ouka Ninja Scrolls
titleNative: バジリスク ～桜花忍法帖～
synopsis: The battle for succession that continued for three generations of shogun in the Keichou era culminated in a gruesome battle of ninja arts between the Kouga and Iga clans. Amidst a rain of flower petals, a man and woman who had decided to live for love were separated once again, beautiful in their transience. However, it is said that by the hand of Hattori Hanzo's adopted son, Kyouhachirou, these two flower petals, whether temporarily or permanently, were given life again and left two mementos behind. These children, born with a destiny of their own, were called Kouga Hachirou and Iga Hibiki. The former had eyes like his father's, and the latter had eyes like her mother's. It is now the Kan'ei era, and the land is at peace. As ninjas begin to disappear into the shadows after being deemed unnecessary, The Kouga and Iga clans ask a favor of Hachirou and Hibiki in hopes of reinforcing their foundations. (Source: Crunchyroll)

title: Case Closed: The Fist of Blue Sapphire
titleEnglish: Case Closed: The Fist of Blue Sapphire
titleNative: 名探偵コナン 紺青の拳（フィスト）
synonyms: Detective Conan Movie 23: The Fist of Blue Sapphire
Meitantei Conan Movie 23: Konjou no Fist
Detectiu Conan: El puny de safir blau
Detetive Conan: O Punho da Safira Azul
Detective Conan: El puño de Zafiro azul
Detective Conan: Il pugno dello zaffiro blu
synopsis: The world's greatest blue sapphire, the "blue lapis fist", said to have sunk in a pirate ship in the late 19th century, on the coasts of Singapore. A local millionaire plots to retrieve it, and when it's exhibited in an exhibition at the Singaporean Marina Sands hotel, a murder takes place. A bloody Kaitou Kid announcement card is found in the crime scene.

synopsis: A very powerful industrialist directs his daughter to pick a husband from three candidates he has chosen for her. They are to come into her life, and their uniqueness would cause her to recognize them immediately. All three of the candidates are outstanding. Well, it’s actually four... The story evolves along the lines of a power political mystery involving a small middle eastern country.

synonyms: หนึ่งร้อยทิวทัศน์แห่งอาวาจิมะ
synopsis: At Awajima Opera School, girls from across Japan strive to earn a place on stage. Wakana is driven by her love of musical theater, while Kinue studies with quiet discipline. Scholarship student Emi draws attention from all—but especially from Keiko, who struggles with admiration and comparison. Through shifting perspectives, their intertwined days explore ambition, friendship, and self-discovery. (Source: Crunchyroll)

title: Yowamushi Pedal: The Movie
synopsis: Sakamichi and the other Souhoku team members receive an invitation to compete in the Kumamoto Hi Province Mountain Range Race towards the end of summer. The top-tier teams from around the country compete in this race, including Souhoku's rivals Hakone Academy (which yearns to take down Sōhoku), Kyoto Fushimi, and Hiroshima Kureminami — as well as Kumamoto Daiichi High School's team led by Shin Yoshimoto. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Haikara-san: Here Comes Miss Modern – Part 1
titleRomaji: Haikara-san ga Tooru: Benio, Hana no 17-sai
titleEnglish: Haikara-san: Here Comes Miss Modern – Part 1
titleNative: はいからさんが通る 前編 ～紅緒、花の17歳～
synopsis: The first film in a duology adaptation of Haikara-san ga Tooru . During the Taisho era of 1918, 17-year-old Benio Hanamura thrives on bucking tradition. As a boisterous and quarrelsome tomboy, Miss Hanamura leads a life of kendo and tree-climbing adventure with her best friends Tamaki and Ranmaru. Benio determines to find love on her own, though her family has other plans. Benio will encounter tests of love, independence, and friendship during wartime. (Source: Eleven Arts)

title: Vampire Princess Miyu (TV)
synonyms: ヴァンパイア ミユ
synopsis: Evil Shinma (shape-shifting monsters and vampires) roam the Earth on a mission to unleash their darkness upon the Human race. Miyu Royal Princess from the dark is the Chosen One—the one being who must banish the Evil Shinma from the Earth. She has the power to offer Humans the gift of eternal happiness, yet is herself, trapped between two worlds; destined for perpetual solitude and internal conflict. Miyu's only companion is Larva, once an evil Shimna; now her devoted guardian. Together they share a dark journey through the weakness of the human heart and the tragic loss of innocence. Cut off from humanity by the knowledge of what she is, Miyu lives an endless quest as both the hunter and the hunted, on the edge of darkness. (Source: AniDB)

title: Rising Impact
titleNative: ライジングインパクト
synonyms: ไรซิ่ง อิมแพ็ค
synopsis: A young boy, Gawain, lives in a mountainous, rural area with an incredible love for baseball and making the ball really fly. One day he runs into a visitor to the small area and she introduces him to a sport that can really make a ball take to flight: golf! It just takes one shot and Gawain is hooked. With his grandpa's approval he sets off to Tokyo with this mysterious woman to learn all he can about golf, encountering many colorful characters and obstacles along the way.

title: ULTRAMAN
synopsis: Decades ago, a being known as the Giant of Light joined Shin Hayata of the Scientific Special Search Party to save Earth from an invasion of terrifying monsters known as Kaiju. Now, many years later, those dark days are fading into memory, and the world is at peace. But in the shadows a new threat is growing, a danger that can only be faced by a new kind of hero - a new kind of Ultraman... Shinjirou is an ordinary teenager, but his father is the legendary Shin Hayata. When he learns that his father passed on the "Ultraman Factor" to him, and that he possesses incredible powers, nothing will ever be the same again. (Source: VIZ Media)

title: Ya Boy Kongming! Road to Summer Sonia
titleRomaji: Paripi Koumei: Road To Summer Sonia
titleEnglish: Ya Boy Kongming! Road to Summer Sonia
titleNative: パリピ孔明 Road to Summer Sonia
synopsis: Compilation film of Ya Boy Kongming! The film features new footage in some of Eiko's performances. The music industry becomes a battlefield when ancient strategist Kongming is transported from historical China to modern Japan. He’ll use military tactics to turn his new friend Eiko into a music star, and together they’ll take the party hotspot of Shibuya by storm! The story is a clever take (and smart twist) on fish-out-of-water and person-out-of-time themes with out-of-this-world results for Ya Boy Kongming! (Source: HIDIVE)

title: Tonari no Yokai-san
synopsis: Welcome to Engamori, the cozy town where supernatural beings are your friendly neighbors. For generations and to this day, the otherworldly Yokai and humans have continued to protect their easygoing way of life. Enjoy the mountain breeze and uncover the mysterious bonds that lie within. (Source: Crunchyroll)

tags.name: Youkai
tags.description: Prominently features supernatural creatures from Japanese folklore.

tags.name: Urban Fantasy
tags.description: Set in a world similar to the real world, but with the existence of magic or other supernatural elements.

tags.name: Rural
tags.description: Partly or completely set in the countryside.

tags.name: Josei
tags.description: Target demographic is adult females.

tags.name: Alternate Universe
tags.description: Features multiple alternate universes in the same series.

tags.name: Family Life
tags.description: Centers around the activities of a family unit.

tags.name: Tragedy
tags.description: Centers around tragic events and unhappy endings.

tags.name: Iyashikei
tags.description: Primary aim is to heal the audience through serene depictions of characters' daily lives.

tags.name: Anthropomorphism
tags.description: Contains non-human character(s) that have attributes or characteristics of a human being.

tags.name: Ensemble Cast
tags.description: Features a large cast of characters with (almost) equal screen time and importance to the plot.

tags.name: Heterosexual
tags.description: Prominently features a romance between a man and a woman, not inherently sexual.

tags.name: LGBTQ+ Themes
tags.description: Prominently features characters or themes associated with the LGBTQ+ community, such as sexuality or gender identity.

tags.name: Amnesia
tags.description: Prominently features a character(s) with memory loss.

tags.name: Gods
tags.description: Prominently features a character of divine or religious nature.

tags.name: Aromantic
tags.description: Features a character who experiences little to no romantic attraction.

tags.name: Demons
tags.description: Prominently features malevolent otherworldly creatures.

tags.name: Shapeshifting
tags.description: Features character(s) who changes one's appearance or form.

title: MONOGATARI Series: OFF & MONSTER Season - A Cruel Fairy Tale: The Beautiful Princess
titleRomaji: Monogatari Series: Off & Monster Season - Zankoku Douwa: Utsukushi-hime
titleEnglish: MONOGATARI Series: OFF & MONSTER Season - A Cruel Fairy Tale: The Beautiful Princess
titleNative: 〈物語〉シリーズ オフ&モンスターシーズン 残酷童話 うつくし姫
synonyms: MONOGATARI Series: OFF & MONSTER Season Episode 6.5
〈物語〉シリーズ オフ&モンスターシーズン EX
Monogatari Series: Off & Monster Season - The Princess Beauty
synopsis: Episode 6.5 of Monogatari Series: Off & Monster Season, adapting the short story "Utsukushi-hime/The Princess Beauty" Once upon a time, there was a true story that happened about 600 years ago. It's a story of a very beautiful girl who lived in a country that no longer exists. (Source: Crunchyroll)

tags.name: Fairy Tale
tags.description: This work tells a fairy tale, centers around fairy tales, or is based on a classic fairy tale.

tags.name: Female Protagonist
tags.description: Main character is female.

tags.name: Suicide
tags.description: The act or an instance of taking or attempting to take one's own life voluntarily and intentionally.

tags.description: Prominently features magical elements or the use of magic.

tags.name: Witch

tags.name: Mixed Media
tags.description: Features a combination of different media and animation techniques. Often seen with puppetry, textiles, live action footage, stop motion, and more. This does not include works with normal usage of CGI in their production.

tags.name: Medieval
tags.description: Partially or completely set in the Middle Ages or a Middle Ages-inspired setting. Commonly features elements such as European castles and knights.

tags.name: Puppetry
tags.description: Animation style involving the manipulation of puppets to act out scenes.

title: Arjuna
synopsis: Juna was just an ordinary high-school girl, right up until the day she died in a motorcycle accident. But there, in the twilight of death, she saw the future of the barren earth destroyed by the Raaja, and was offered a second chance at life if she would stop them. Now she must learn to cast aside her thoughtlessly destructive ways and face her destiny as the Avatar of Time, the one being who can decide the fate of the planet. (Source: Anime News Network)

tags.name: Environmental
tags.description: Concern with the state of the natural world and how humans interact with it.

tags.name: Eco-Horror
tags.description: Utilizes a horrifying depiction of ecology to explore man and its relationship with nature.

tags.description: Set in a world similar to the real world, but with the existence of magic or other supernatural elements.

tags.description: Features a combination of different media and animation techniques. Often seen with puppetry, textiles, live action footage, stop motion, and more. This does not include works with normal usage of CGI in their production.

tags.name: Philosophy
tags.description: Relating or devoted to the study of the fundamental nature of knowledge, reality, and existence.

tags.name: Reincarnation
tags.description: Features a character being born again after death, typically as another person or in another world.

tags.name: Educational

tags.name: Coastal

tags.name: Pandemic
tags.description: Prominently features a disease prevalent over a whole country or the world.

tags.name: Henshin
tags.description: Prominently features character or costume transformations which often grant special abilities.

tags.name: Estranged Family
tags.description: At least one family member of the MC intentionally distances themselves or a family distances themselves from a person related to the MC.

tags.name: Orphan
tags.description: Prominently features a character that is an orphan.

tags.name: Disability
tags.description: A work that features one or more characters with a physical, mental, cognitive, or developmental condition that impairs, interferes with, or limits the person's ability to engage in certain tasks or actions.

tags.name: Military
tags.description: Centered around the life and activities of military personnel.

tags.name: Rural
tags.description: Partly or completely set in the countryside.

tags.name: Love Triangle
tags.description: Centered around romantic feelings between more than two people. Includes all love polygons.

tags.name: Agriculture

tags.name: School
tags.description: Partly or completely set in a primary or secondary educational institution.

tags.name: Heterosexual
tags.description: Prominently features a romance between a man and a woman, not inherently sexual.

tags.name: Body Horror
tags.description: Features characters who undergo horrific transformations or disfigurement, often to their own detriment.

tags.name: Necromancy
tags.description: When the dead are summoned as spirits, skeletons, or the undead, usually for the purpose of gaining information or to be used as a weapon.

tags.name: Cultivation
tags.description: Features characters using training, often martial arts-related, and other special methods to cultivate qi (a component of traditional Chinese philosophy, described as "life force") and gain strength or immortality.
